raw_responses.title: Gunpowder — Wikipedia
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: corning → grain sieving → burn-rate via surface/volume; F-grading 1F-7F (fine to coarse).

raw_responses.title: FG vs FFFFG Blackpowder
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: FFFFG fastest; FG slowest; calibrated to firearm bore.

raw_responses.title: AdaServe: SLO-Customized LLM Serving with Fine-Grained Speculative Decoding (2025/1)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: dynamically adjusts speculation parameters per workload; chunked-prefill partitions long prefill into chunks — i.e., adaptive granularity matched to per-request SLO.

raw_responses.title: BatchLLM (2024/12)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: token-batching at multiple granularities; prefix-sharing groups.

raw_responses.title: HAMburger Token Smashing (2025/5)

raw_responses.title: Speculative Decoding in Decentralized LLM Inference (2025/11)
